sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bits (id UInt32, number Int32, index UInt8);
INSERT INTO test_bits (id, number, index) VALUES (1, 43, 1);
INSERT INTO test_bits (id, number, index) VALUES (2, 43, 2);
SELECT id, bitTest(number, index) AS bit_value FROM test_bits;
UPDATE test_bits SET index = 1 WHERE id = 1;
